summary: W883 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while routing W733 concrete leaves through the W882, W881, W880, and W879 comparison concrete-leaves stable ExactAt route. Product success remains false because the eight W733 concrete leaf providers, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W883 moves the latest W879-based stable ExactAt boundary from one W732 route-data provider to eight W733 concrete leaf providers, but those W733 fields are still not instantiated.

The remaining W733 fields are boundary data, relation data, target surjectivity and compactness, matched selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closedness branch data, normalized fixed-target data, source homological-triangulation data, endpoint strict-topology data, and localized-right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the eight W733 concrete leaf providers.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
